variable_declarations.pattern:
Dim strName As String
Dim intAge As Integer
Dim dblSalary As Double
Dim blnActive As Boolean
Dim varData As Variant
variable_declarations.description: Basic variable declarations with VB6 to C# type mappings

complex_class_with_properties.pattern:
Private m_ID As Long
Private m_Name As String
Private m_Email As String
Private m_CreatedDate As Date
Private m_IsActive As Boolean

Public Property Get ID() As Long
    ID = m_ID
End Property

Public Property Let ID(ByVal vNewValue As Long)
    m_ID = vNewValue
End Property

Public Property Get Name() As String
    Name = m_Name
End Property

Public Property Let Name(ByVal vNewValue As String)
    If Len(vNewValue) > 0 And Len(vNewValue) <= 50 Then
        m_Name = vNewValue
    Else
        Err.Raise vbObjectError + 1, "User", "Name must be 1-50 characters"
    End If
End Property

Public Property Get Email() As String
    Email = m_Email
End Property

Public Property Let Email(ByVal vNewValue As String)
    If InStr(vNewValue, "@") > 0 Then
        m_Email = vNewValue
    Else
        Err.Raise vbObjectError + 2, "User", "Invalid email format"
    End If
End Property

Public Function GetDisplayName() As String
    GetDisplayName = m_Name & " (" & m_Email & ")"
End Function

Public Sub Activate()
    m_IsActive = True
    m_CreatedDate = Now
End Sub
complex_class_with_properties.description: Complex class with validated properties and business logic methods

function_declaration.pattern:

    CalculateTotal = price * quantity
End Function

while_loop.pattern:
While condition = True

    counter = counter + 1

Wend

do_loop.pattern:

    counter = counter + 1
Loop

Loop Until counter >= 10

result = 10 / value

End Sub

Public Function GetData() As String
End Function

' VB6 Class implementing interface
Implements IDataProvider

Private Sub IDataProvider_Connect()
    ' Implementation
End Sub

Private Function IDataProvider_GetData() As String

enumeration_with_class.pattern:
' VB6 Enum (in separate module)
Public Enum StatusType
    stActive = 1
    stInactive = 2
    stPending = 3
    stSuspended = 4
End Enum

' VB6 Class using enum
Private m_Status As StatusType
Private m_StatusHistory As Collection

Public Property Get Status() As StatusType
    Status = m_Status
End Property

Public Property Let Status(ByVal value As StatusType)
    If value <> m_Status Then
        m_StatusHistory.Add m_Status & ":" & Now
        m_Status = value
    End If
End Property

Public Function GetStatusText() As String
    Select Case m_Status
        Case stActive: GetStatusText = "Active"
        Case stInactive: GetStatusText = "Inactive"
        Case stPending: GetStatusText = "Pending"
        Case stSuspended: GetStatusText = "Suspended"
        Case Else: GetStatusText = "Unknown"
    End Select
End Function
enumeration_with_class.description: Enumeration usage with class properties and switch expressions

event_handling_class.pattern:
' VB6 Class with events
Public Event DataChanged(ByVal oldValue As String, ByVal newValue As String)
Public Event ValidationFailed(ByVal errorMessage As String)
Public Event ProcessCompleted()

Private m_Data As String
Private m_IsProcessing As Boolean

Public Property Let Data(ByVal value As String)
    Dim oldValue As String
    oldValue = m_Data
    
    If ValidateData(value) Then
        m_Data = value
        RaiseEvent DataChanged(oldValue, value)
    Else
        RaiseEvent ValidationFailed("Invalid data format")
    End If
End Property

Private Function ValidateData(ByVal data As String) As Boolean
    ValidateData = (Len(data) > 0 And Len(data) <= 100)
End Function

Public Sub ProcessData()
    If Not m_IsProcessing Then
        m_IsProcessing = True
        ' Processing logic here
        DoEvents
        m_IsProcessing = False
        RaiseEvent ProcessCompleted
    End If
End Sub
event_handling_class.description: Event-driven class with validation and async processing

inheritance_pattern.pattern:
' VB6 Base Class
Private m_Name As String
Private m_ID As Long

Public Property Get Name() As String
    Name = m_Name
End Property

Public Property Let Name(ByVal value As String)
    m_Name = value
End Property

Public Property Get ID() As Long
    ID = m_ID
End Property

Public Property Let ID(ByVal value As Long)
    m_ID = value
End Property

Public Function GetInfo() As String
    GetInfo = "Base: " & m_Name
End Function

' VB6 Derived Class (composition-based inheritance)
Private m_Base As BaseClass
Private m_Salary As Double

Private Sub Class_Initialize()
    Set m_Base = New BaseClass
End Sub

Public Property Get Name() As String
    Name = m_Base.Name
End Property

Public Property Let Name(ByVal value As String)
    m_Base.Name = value
End Property

Public Property Get Salary() As Double
    Salary = m_Salary
End Property

Public Property Let Salary(ByVal value As Double)
    If value >= 0 Then
        m_Salary = value
    End If
End Property

Public Function GetInfo() As String
    GetInfo = m_Base.GetInfo() & ", Salary: " & m_Salary
End Function
inheritance_pattern.description: Inheritance pattern with virtual methods and property override

factory_pattern.pattern:
' VB6 Factory Class
Public Enum DocumentType
    dtWord = 1
    dtExcel = 2
    dtPowerPoint = 3
End Enum

Public Function CreateDocument(ByVal docType As DocumentType) As Object
    Select Case docType
        Case dtWord
            Set CreateDocument = CreateObject("Word.Application")
        Case dtExcel
            Set CreateDocument = CreateObject("Excel.Application")
        Case dtPowerPoint
            Set CreateDocument = CreateObject("PowerPoint.Application")
        Case Else
            Set CreateDocument = Nothing
    End Select
End Function

Public Function CreateDocumentWithTemplate(ByVal docType As DocumentType, ByVal templatePath As String) As Object
    Dim doc As Object
    Set doc = CreateDocument(docType)
    
    If Not doc Is Nothing Then
        ' Configure with template
        Select Case docType
            Case dtWord
                doc.Documents.Add templatePath
            Case dtExcel
                doc.Workbooks.Add templatePath
        End Select
    End If
    
    Set CreateDocumentWithTemplate = doc
End Function
factory_pattern.description: Factory pattern with interface implementation and dependency injection ready

data_access_class.pattern:
' VB6 Data Access Class
Private m_Connection As Object
Private m_RecordSet As Object
Private m_ConnectionString As String

Private Sub Class_Initialize()
    Set m_Connection = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
    Set m_RecordSet = CreateObject("ADODB.Recordset")
End Sub

Public Property Let ConnectionString(ByVal value As String)
    m_ConnectionString = value
End Property

Public Function Connect() As Boolean
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    m_Connection.Open m_ConnectionString
    Connect = True
    Exit Function
    
ErrorHandler:
    Connect = False
End Function

Public Function ExecuteQuery(ByVal sql As String) As Collection
    Dim results As New Collection
    Dim record As Collection
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    Set m_RecordSet = m_Connection.Execute(sql)
    
    Do While Not m_RecordSet.EOF
        Set record = New Collection
        For i = 0 To m_RecordSet.Fields.Count - 1
            record.Add m_RecordSet.Fields(i).Value, m_RecordSet.Fields(i).Name
        Next i
        results.Add record
        m_RecordSet.MoveNext
    Loop
    
    Set ExecuteQuery = results
    Exit Function
    
ErrorHandler:
    Set ExecuteQuery = Nothing
End Function

Private Sub Class_Terminate()
    If Not m_RecordSet Is Nothing Then
        If m_RecordSet.State <> 0 Then m_RecordSet.Close
        Set m_RecordSet = Nothing
    End If
    
    If Not m_Connection Is Nothing Then
        If m_Connection.State <> 0 Then m_Connection.Close
        Set m_Connection = Nothing
    End If
End Sub
data_access_class.description: Data access layer with async operations, generics, and proper resource disposal

singleton_pattern.pattern:
' VB6 Singleton Class
Private m_Instance As MyLogger
Private m_LogFile As String
Private m_IsInitialized As Boolean

Public Function GetInstance() As MyLogger
    If m_Instance Is Nothing Then
        Set m_Instance = New MyLogger
        m_Instance.Initialize
    End If
    Set GetInstance = m_Instance
End Function

Private Sub Initialize()
    If Not m_IsInitialized Then
        m_LogFile = App.Path & "\log.txt"
        m_IsInitialized = True
    End If
End Sub

Public Sub WriteLog(ByVal message As String)
    Dim fileNum As Integer
    fileNum = FreeFile
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Open m_LogFile For Append As #fileNum
    Print #fileNum, Now & ": " & message
    Close #fileNum
End Sub

Private Sub Class_Initialize()
    ' Prevent direct instantiation would be ideal but not easily done in VB6
End Sub
singleton_pattern.description: Thread-safe singleton pattern with lazy initialization and async support

validation_class.pattern:
' VB6 Validation Class
Private m_Errors As Collection
Private m_Warnings As Collection

Private Sub Class_Initialize()
    Set m_Errors = New Collection
    Set m_Warnings = New Collection
End Sub

Public Function ValidateEmail(ByVal email As String) As Boolean
    If InStr(email, "@") = 0 Then
        m_Errors.Add "Invalid email format: " & email
        ValidateEmail = False
    ElseIf Len(email) > 100 Then
        m_Warnings.Add "Email address is very long: " & email
        ValidateEmail = True
    Else
        ValidateEmail = True
    End If
End Function

Public Function ValidateAge(ByVal age As Integer) As Boolean
    If age < 0 Then
        m_Errors.Add "Age cannot be negative"
        ValidateAge = False
    ElseIf age > 120 Then
        m_Warnings.Add "Age seems unusually high: " & age
        ValidateAge = True
    ElseIf age < 18 Then
        m_Warnings.Add "Person is under 18 years old"
        ValidateAge = True
    Else
        ValidateAge = True
    End If
End Function

Public Function HasErrors() As Boolean
    HasErrors = (m_Errors.Count > 0)
End Function

Public Function GetErrorMessages() As String
    Dim result As String
    Dim i As Integer
    
    For i = 1 To m_Errors.Count
        result = result & m_Errors.Item(i) & vbCrLf
    Next i
    
    GetErrorMessages = result
End Function

Public Sub ClearValidation()
    Set m_Errors = New Collection
    Set m_Warnings = New Collection
End Sub
validation_class.description: Comprehensive validation class with fluent API, regex support, and data annotations
